## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Send request to '...'
4. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, status codes, and stack traces if available.

## Environment

- **Browser** (if frontend): Chrome 120 / Firefox 121 / ...
- **Deployment**: Local Docker / Vercel+Railway / Other

Paste relevant logs here (remove any API keys or secrets)
